mainEntity.name: What is the most profitable Stardew Valley crop per season?

acceptedAnswer.text: Spring: Strawberries (120g/day with Tiller). Summer: Starfruit (383g/day) or Blueberries (75g/day). Fall: Cranberries (85g/day) or Pumpkins (54g/day). Greenhouse: Ancient Fruit (110g/day), Hops for Pale Ale (420g/day per keg).

mainEntity.name: Should I use fertilizer in Stardew Valley?

acceptedAnswer.text: Speed-Gro for multi-harvest crops (extra harvest). Quality Fertilizer for direct-sale crops. Deluxe Speed-Gro for Starfruit (9 days instead of 13).

mainEntity.name: What new crops were added in Stardew Valley 1.6?

acceptedAnswer.text: Carrots (Spring), Summer Squash (Summer), Broccoli (Fall), and Powdermelon (Winter greenhouse). Also added the Meadowlands farm with bluegrass.
